/usr/bin/c++  -O3 -fPIC  -rdynamic CMakeFiles/example_joystick.dir/example/example_joystick.cpp.o  -o ../../../example_joystick   -L/ws/SimEnv/src/unitree_guide/unitree_ros_to_real/unitree_legged_sdk/lib/cpp/amd64  -Wl,-rpath,/ws/SimEnv/src/unitree_guide/unitree_ros_to_real/unitree_legged_sdk/lib/cpp/amd64: -pthread -Wl,-Bstatic -lunitree_legged_sdk -Wl,-Bdynamic
